root.content: Execute Pack Plan Phase 3: Session-State Isolation Completion (Fix 3C-D)

children.content: Phase 3 COMPLETE. Now executing Phase 4: Dual-Injection Decoupling (Fix 1) - entering restricted region
Phase 4: Designing hybrid integration approach - taking best of each system for unified flow

Investigation complete: Mapped 6 pollution pathways and 5 dual-injection conflicts across 3 independent injection systems. Evidence package delivered (95% confidence). Awaiting Phase 4 authorization for Fix 1 implementation.

Phase 1: Skill Ecosystem Audit - Analyzing current skill inventory, identifying fragmentation patterns, and mapping cross-cutting concerns between meta-builder (hivefiver) and project contexts per REQ-MBF-2026-03-04 Section 6.3.1
Phase 1: Creating unified skill ecosystem inventory with pattern analysis, maturity scoring, and consolidation roadmap per REQ-MBF-2026-03-04 §6.3.1 audit dimensions
Subagent investigation complete. Synthesizing findings into REQ-MBF-2026-03-04 compliant audit document with pattern analysis, maturity scoring, and consolidation roadmap.

Phase 2 TDD: Archiving discardable skills to .archive/, creating 2 Lineage Entry Packages (Hiveminder Orchestration + Hivefiver Meta-Builder) with full rationale per SPEC-META-BUILDER-MODULE-2026-03-01.md §9
Executing delegated skill archive operation: move confirmed deprecated/merge-candidate/duplicate skills from skills/ to .archive/skills and generate archive inventory
Subagent failure during skill archive operation. Context quality emergency [4/4] detected. Awaiting hivefiver research phase execution.
Clarifying agent role: hiverd (research specialist) received hivefiver command. Awaiting research scope definition.
Auto-realign command '/hivefiver research' attempted via hiverd; returned blocked due invalid stage routing and missing research scope. Logged and proceeding with delegated archive task.
Archive task execution resumed after logging auto-realign failure. Completing skills move and inventory generation.
Skill archive operation completed: moved confirmed discardable skills and created archive inventory.

Creating 2 Lineage Entry Packages: (1) Hiveminder Orchestration Package for .hivemind/ lineage with phase-planning validation chain, (2) Hivefiver Meta-Builder Package for .opencode/ lineage with asset construction protocols. TDD approach: defining acceptance criteria and tests before implementation.
Following TDD workflow: Step 1 - Research and analysis using find-skills, skill-judge, skill-creator. Will propose skill designs BEFORE writing, await user approval.

Acknowledging subagent failure and clarifying scope: Building HIVEFIVER entry skills first (not hiveminder). Hivefiver = meta-builder for framework assets (skills, commands, workflows). Hiveminder = project orchestrator (external libs/SDKs). This project IS the framework itself.

Subagent archive operation: 24 skills moved to .archive/, but tests failing (4 test suites). Context quality [4/4] requires recovery. User clarified scope: Build HIVEFIVER entry skills FIRST. This project = the framework itself. Hivefiver builds framework assets (skills, commands, workflows, agents). Hiveminder handles external libraries/SDKs (separate concern).

User clarified shared early phases: Both hiveminder and hivefiver share intake/requirements/Q&A phases, then diverge. Hivefiver doctors hiveminder with OpenCode primitives knowledge. Hivefiver sets up healers for custom tools. Hiveminder ventures into src/. Both need context collectors to prevent flooding.
